primitives.name: ds-btn
primitives.description: Button. Add .is-primary for the single main action, .is-ghost for low-emphasis, .is-danger for destructive.
examples:
<button class="ds-btn is-primary"><svg><!-- icon --></svg>Start</button>
              <button class="ds-btn">Secondary</button>
              <button class="ds-btn is-ghost">Ghost</button>
              <button class="ds-btn is-danger"><svg><!-- icon --></svg>Delete</button>
              <button class="ds-btn" disabled>Disabled</button>

<button class="ds-btn is-primary is-sm">Small</button>
              <button class="ds-btn is-primary">Default</button>
              <button class="ds-btn is-primary is-lg">Large</button>

<button class="ds-btn is-icon" title="Restart"><svg><!-- icon --></svg></button>
              <button class="ds-btn is-icon" title="Reconnect"><svg><!-- icon --></svg></button>
              <button class="ds-btn is-ghost is-icon" title="More"><svg><!-- icon --></svg></button>
